title: What your Website do?/what you can do
description: PixelAI is a team of skilled developers, designers, and AI engineers that builds smart, scalable digital products. They've created real-world solutions in industries like cybersecurity, finance, and domain management — including platforms like AptChecker (a DNS/domain tool), SafeYourWeb (a website security landing), and predictive maintenance tools for IoT analytics. They specialize in AI-driven services, chatbot integration, and full-cycle product development, and they're always open to discussing pricing, timelines, tech stacks, and use cases for your business.

title: What makes you differnt
description: As the name suggests, PixelAI blends the best of two worlds: Pixel-perfect UI design and cutting-edge AI solutions. We specialize in crafting visually stunning, highly usable interfaces tailored specifically to your business needs—while also delivering smart, AI-powered capabilities like chatbots, predictive analytics, and AI consulting. Whether you're building a product from scratch or scaling your business with intelligent tools, PixelAI ensures both beauty and brains in every solution

title: Taqari – AI Mock Interview Platform
description: Taqari is an AI-powered mock interview platform built by PixelAI. It helps users practice real-time video interviews with AI interviewers, get detailed performance reports, and prepare for tech and non-tech roles. The platform provides 24/7 practice, personalized learning, and industry-specific questions.
features: Real-time AI video interviews with instant feedback
Pricing plans: Basic Monthly, Annual Pro, Unlimited Premium

title: Taqari Features & FAQ
description: Taqari offers AI-powered mock interviews with advanced algorithms for body language and communication analysis. It adapts questions to your skill level and includes a DSA compiler for coding interview practice.
features: AI-powered analysis of body language and communication skills
Adaptive questions based on skill level and industry
Proven results — thousands of successful candidates
Free plan available to get started
Built-in DSA compiler for coding practice

title: Nayi Umeed – Emotional Support & Counseling Platform
description: Nayi Umeed (नयी उम्मीद) is an emotional wellness platform built by PixelAI. It provides professional counseling, legal assistance, astrology guidance, and survivor support stories. The platform serves users across India with 24/7 availability in English and Hindi.
features: Professional emotional support and counseling services
Legal help and guidance for domestic violence survivors
Razorpay payment integration for service bookings

title: SafeYourWeb – Website Security Platform
description: SafeYourWeb is a cybersecurity landing platform developed by PixelAI. It offers professional website security services, backend protection solutions, and real-time threat monitoring. Built with React and Framer Motion for smooth interactive experiences.
features: Performance-optimized landing page with Framer Motion

title: Code Achievers – Internship & Career Platform
description: Code Achievers is a client project developed by PixelAI that provides internships and career guidance to early-stage students. It helps students gain industry exposure through structured programs, with Cashfree payment gateway integration for course payments.
features: Internship programs for students starting their careers
Tech courses and structured learning programs
